sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36573" key="e)cairi=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαιρ-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n36573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ladder,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:36:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
